race.description: March 15 Gold Coast Bowls & Community Club Hcp (Bm65)
race.comment: POSSIBILITIES (11) won easily at the Sunshine Coast four back and has placed close up the three times since in stronger city company.  Maps for a soft run and Mallyon goes on. Drops back to the mile and is sure to go close. RASHFORD (3) peaks and is much better suited than at Doomben. Maps well and rates to go close. POWER ACE (7) resumed in good order over 1500m for the top barn and may go on with it this time around. Has some gear tweaks, including the tongue tie on again. Is free running and has to be kept safe. VACILLATION (8) has won and placed his last two this distance in the country. Positions forward and no surprise if he's in the finish.
